## Preceding prose

> *VOLATILE:* See [above](#multiple_voices "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵").
> To avoid ambiguity, [inline fields](#inline_field_definition "abc:standard:v2.1 ↵") that specify music properties should be repeated in every voice to which they apply.
> *Example:*
